title: Wrong constraint name in error message of constraint violation
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (user_id Int32, username String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY user_id;
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id Int32, user_id Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY order_id;
CREATE TABLE payments (payment_id Int32, order_id Int32, amount Decimal(10, 2)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY payment_id;
key_bug_features: inserting into table with foreign key references
